project_type: Single-file HTML electrical engineering calculator app
language: JavaScript (ES5/ES6 mix), HTML, CSS - all inline in one file
build_command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('el-dimensionering.html','utf8'); const m=html.match(/<script>([\s\S]*)<\/script>/); new Function(m[1]);" (parse check)
verification_instructions: 1. Run parse check (new Function on extracted script). 2. Run node test-sld.js, expect 1506 passed 0 failed. 3. Run grep -cE 'type="text"|<textarea' el-dimensionering.html, expect exactly 4.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - Node.js is pre-installed
environment_constraints: Single-file only, zero dependencies, click-only input (guard: type='text'|textarea count must stay at 4), life-safety critical calculations must not be altered
contribution_requirements: Never change calculation logic. Only change UI rendering. Must preserve all existing onclick handlers and state mutations. Use tx(da, en) for all user-facing strings.
key_patterns: UX retrofit pattern: 1) Add uxSummary([{label, value, status}]) after card-title for executive overview. 2) Keep 1-2 essential selectors always visible. 3) Wrap secondary/advanced params in uxPanel(title, bodyHtml, {id, icon, open: condition}). 4) Use uxModeLevel() >= 2 for engineer-plus auto-open. 5) Detect non-default values to auto-open relevant panels. 6) Never change calculation functions or state objects.
relevant_files: el-dimensionering.html (lines 18674-18935 for renderBusbar as exemplar of retrofit pattern)
directory_structure: Single file app: el-dimensionering.html (32,499 lines), test-sld.js (14,678 lines, 1506 tests)
